metadata.title: Post-quantum cryptography (PQC) chips - SEALSQ/WISeKey vs incumbents; the stacked-narrative microcap pattern
metadata.provenance: Web-verified (NIST CSRC, GlobeNewswire/SEALSQ/WISeKey press, StockTitan, Investing.com, MarketsandMarkets, Infineon/NXP/Thales). Vendor press flagged.
metadata.frame: The real PQC market (post NIST FIPS 203/204/205) is growing but incumbent-dominated. SEALSQ/WISeKey are speculative microcaps stacking THREE narratives - quantum + space + crypto/AI - and monetizing via equity dilution and partnership press. They also touch the digital-ID/PKI layer (WISeKey is a PKI/identity firm).

real_market.standards: NIST finalized FIPS 203 (ML-KEM), 204 (ML-DSA), 205 (SLH-DSA) on Aug 13 2024 - a real, mandated migration driver.
incumbents: Infineon (SLC27 security controller, CC-certified ML-KEM/ML-DSA, first-mover)
Thales (co-developed a standardized algorithm; Luna HSMs with FIPS 203/204/205)

companies.name: SEALSQ
facts: Stock ~$2.45, -35% YTD; reported strong liquidity (current ratio 7.38, more cash than debt) - consistent with heavy equity raising during the 2024-25 quantum mania (dilution-funded cash)
Competes against Infineon/NXP/STMicro/Thales in secure elements - a market it does not lead

companies.name: WISeKey
companies.grade: SPECULATIVE; legacy PKI/identity pivoting to quantum+space
facts: WISeSat.Space launched its 21st LEO satellite (QS7001 aboard) on SpaceX Falcon 9 Transporter-16, Mar 30 2026, Vandenberg
companies.spacex_relationship: RIDESHARE LAUNCH CUSTOMER (picosats on SpaceX Transporter missions) - NOT a strategic partnership or investment by SpaceX.

pqc_migration_economics.summary: Who profits from the MANDATED PQC migration - the corpus's real-need-vs-manufactured-demand lens applied to post-quantum. The migration is genuinely necessary (a CRQC breaks RSA/ECC), AND it is a deadline-driven, population-scale compliance-capex event with order-of-magnitude-divergent forecasts and at least one narrative-beta poster child. Web-verified 2026-06. Cross-ref macro-crqc-quantum-landscape (digital-ID migration status) + digitalid-orchestration-real-incentive (the capex-kicker rebuttal).
pqc_migration_economics.the_mandate_that_forces_the_spend: NIST: RSA-2048/ECC P-256 deprecated 2030, disallowed 2035. NSA CNSA 2.0: NSS quantum-safe 2027/2030/2035. The Quantum Computing Cybersecurity Preparedness Act (signed late 2022) + OMB M-23-02 force federal crypto-INVENTORIES and migration planning. EU: DORA/NIS2 + crypto inventories by end-2026. Deadlines, not preferences - they convert security into a procurement line.
pqc_migration_economics.the_federal_price_tag: The White House/OMB report to Congress (Aug 2024, mandated by the QCCPA) estimates ~$7.1 BILLION for federal CIVILIAN agencies to migrate to PQC over 2025-2035 (2024 dollars) - and that figure EXCLUDES national-security systems (DoD/IC), so the true government spend is materially higher. status: fact (OMB report).
pqc_migration_economics.the_forecast_divergence_is_the_tell: Analyst PQC-market forecasts disagree by an ORDER OF MAGNITUDE: MarketsandMarkets ~$0.42B (2025) -> $2.84B (2030) @ ~46% CAGR; Precedence ~$1.68B -> $29.95B (2034) @ ~38%; another ~$0.47B -> $19.2B (2034) @ ~49%; ~$15B by 2035 @ ~39%. When 'the market' is quoted anywhere from <$3B to ~$30B for adjacent horizons, the number is a narrative, not a measurement - the same forecast-fog that surrounds every bubble theme. status: fact (the divergent published figures) + labeled (the 'tell').

real_shipping: Microsoft SymCrypt (ML-KEM/ML-DSA in production; AD CS ML-DSA cert issuance GA May 2026) + AWS KMS - the PKI BACKENDS
Thales (first quantum-resistant SMART CARD - MultiApp 5.2 Premium PQC, Oct 2025 Europe; SafeNet Luna HSM PQC)
Infineon/NXP/STMicro (CC-certified PQC secure elements - the incumbents)
ip_and_specialist: PQShield (~$37M Series B Jun-2024, >$60M total; embedded PQC IP in AMD/Microchip/Collins/Toyota - real customer depth)

SandboxAQ (HQC co-author; Alphabet spinout) - $5.75B valuation (Series E ~$450M+$95M, Apr 2025; Google/NVIDIA/Dalio/Schmidt/Benioff) on reported ~$18M ARR = a ~320x revenue multiple: the PQC NARRATIVE-BETA poster child
consultancies: Deloitte/Accenture/IBM Consulting - crypto-inventory + migration services (the audit-and-remediate annuity)
narrative_microcaps: SEALSQ/WISeKey (QS7001) - the speculative vehicle profiled above; real chip, narrative-stacked, dilution-funded

pqc_migration_economics.the_real_vs_hype_split: REAL: the mandate ($7.1B federal floor), the standards (FIPS 203/204/205 + HQC), and the shipping backends/HSMs/cards/certs (Microsoft/AWS/DigiCert/Entrust/Thales/Infineon/NXP). HYPE: the order-of-magnitude-divergent TAM forecasts, the ~320x SandboxAQ multiple, and the narrative-stacked microcaps (SEALSQ). It is the corpus's recurring shape - a real macro-driver wrapped in a manufactured-demand froth - here uniquely BACKED BY LAW (deadlines + crypto-inventory mandates), which is why the incumbents and the consultancies, not the microcaps, capture most of the actual spend.
pqc_migration_economics.ties_to_the_thesis: This is the financial face of the digital-ID post-quantum argument (digitalid-orchestration-real-incentive #pqc_escape_hatch): the mandated migration is simultaneously (a) necessary security work and (b) a vendor-captured capex windfall that ENTRENCHES the same rail-builders (Oracle/Microsoft PKI, SEALSQ) - 'just migrate to PQC' both fails to answer centralization AND pays the incumbents to harden the control rail.
pqc_migration_economics.grade: the $7.1B OMB estimate + mandate deadlines + SandboxAQ/PQShield funding + shipping products FACT (web-verified); the forecast-divergence-as-tell and the narrative-beta/capex-windfall framing are labeled interpretation

assessment: LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS for SEALSQ/WISeKey as major PQC-chip players: LOW. The PQC migration is real and incumbent-led; SEALSQ's edge is press-release velocity and narrative-stacking, not silicon market share or certification depth. The SpaceX tie is a launch-customer relationship. This is the SAME microcap pattern as the critical-minerals juniors (macro-critical-minerals.json) and the IPO compute-padding (fin-spacex-spcx.json): real macro-theme, speculative vehicle. Classification: semiconductor/quantum SUB-BUBBLE, narrative-driven, dilution-funded; tangential to the AI circular core (not part of the SCC), but a clean example of bubble-adjacent froth and of the digital-ID/PKI thread reappearing.
